info.title: OpenF1 API
info.description: OpenF1 provides free, real-time and historical Formula 1 data through a RESTful API. Access car telemetry, driver info, lap times, pit stops, race control messages, session data, stints, team radio, and weather information.

get.description: Returns car telemetry data including speed, RPM, gear, throttle, brake, and DRS status. Data is available at a high frequency during sessions.

parameters.name: driver_number
parameters.description: The unique number assigned to an F1 driver

parameters.name: session_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the session

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: date>
parameters.description: Filter results where date is greater than the specified value (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: date<
parameters.description: Filter results where date is less than the specified value (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: speed>=
parameters.description: Filter by minimum speed (km/h)

parameters.name: speed<=
parameters.description: Filter by maximum speed (km/h)

parameters.name: n_gear
parameters.description: Filter by gear number

get.description: Returns driver information for a session including name, team, number, and country.

parameters.name: driver_number
parameters.description: The unique number assigned to an F1 driver

parameters.name: session_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the session

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: name_acronym
parameters.description: Filter by three-letter driver acronym (e.g. VER)

parameters.name: team_name
parameters.description: Filter by team name

parameters.name: first_name
parameters.description: Filter by first name

parameters.name: last_name
parameters.description: Filter by last name

parameters.name: country_code
parameters.description: Filter by three-letter country code

get.description: Returns interval data showing the gap between drivers and to the race leader. Only available during races.

parameters.name: driver_number
parameters.description: The unique number assigned to an F1 driver

parameters.name: session_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the session

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: date>
parameters.description: Filter results where date is greater than the specified value (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: date<
parameters.description: Filter results where date is less than the specified value (ISO 8601)

get.description: Returns lap timing data including sector times, speed traps, and segment mini-sector data.

parameters.name: driver_number
parameters.description: The unique number assigned to an F1 driver

parameters.name: session_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the session

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: lap_number
parameters.description: Filter by lap number

parameters.name: lap_number>=
parameters.description: Filter by minimum lap number

parameters.name: lap_number<=
parameters.description: Filter by maximum lap number

parameters.name: is_pit_out_lap
parameters.description: Filter pit out laps

get.description: Returns the approximate location of cars on the track as x, y, z coordinates. Data is sampled at a high frequency.

parameters.name: driver_number
parameters.description: The unique number assigned to an F1 driver

parameters.name: session_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the session

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: date>
parameters.description: Filter results where date is greater than the specified value (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: date<
parameters.description: Filter results where date is less than the specified value (ISO 8601)

get.description: Returns information about F1 meetings (Grand Prix weekends) including circuit details, location, and dates.

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Filter by year

parameters.name: country_name
parameters.description: Filter by country name

parameters.name: circuit_short_name
parameters.description: Filter by circuit short name

get.description: Returns pit stop data including pit duration and the lap on which the pit stop occurred.

parameters.name: driver_number
parameters.description: The unique number assigned to an F1 driver

parameters.name: session_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the session

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: lap_number
parameters.description: Filter by lap number

parameters.name: pit_duration<
parameters.description: Filter by maximum pit duration in seconds

parameters.name: pit_duration>
parameters.description: Filter by minimum pit duration in seconds

parameters.name: date>
parameters.description: Filter results where date is greater than the specified value (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: date<
parameters.description: Filter results where date is less than the specified value (ISO 8601)

get.description: Returns the position (ranking) of each driver during a session. Position changes are tracked over time.

parameters.name: driver_number
parameters.description: The unique number assigned to an F1 driver

parameters.name: session_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the session

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: position
parameters.description: Filter by position number

parameters.name: position<=
parameters.description: Filter by maximum position

parameters.name: date>
parameters.description: Filter results where date is greater than the specified value (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: date<
parameters.description: Filter results where date is less than the specified value (ISO 8601)

get.description: Returns race control messages including flags, safety car deployments, DRS activations, and other official notifications.

parameters.name: session_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the session

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: driver_number
parameters.description: The unique number assigned to an F1 driver

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: Filter by flag type (e.g. GREEN, YELLOW, RED)

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by message category

parameters.name: date>
parameters.description: Filter results where date is greater than the specified value (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: date<
parameters.description: Filter results where date is less than the specified value (ISO 8601)

get.description: Returns information about F1 sessions including practice, qualifying, sprint, and race sessions.

parameters.name: session_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the session

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: session_name
parameters.description: Filter by session name (e.g. Race, Qualifying, Practice 1)

parameters.name: session_type
parameters.description: Filter by session type

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Filter by year

parameters.name: country_name
parameters.description: Filter by country name

get.description: Returns stint information including tyre compound, lap range, and tyre age for each driver's stints.

parameters.name: driver_number
parameters.description: The unique number assigned to an F1 driver

parameters.name: session_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the session

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: compound
parameters.description: Filter by tyre compound (SOFT, MEDIUM, HARD, INTERMEDIATE, WET)

parameters.name: stint_number
parameters.description: Filter by stint number

parameters.name: tyre_age_at_start>=
parameters.description: Filter by minimum tyre age at start

get.description: Returns team radio messages with links to audio recordings of driver-team communications.

parameters.name: driver_number
parameters.description: The unique number assigned to an F1 driver

parameters.name: session_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the session

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: date>
parameters.description: Filter results where date is greater than the specified value (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: date<
parameters.description: Filter results where date is less than the specified value (ISO 8601)

get.description: Returns weather data including air and track temperature, humidity, pressure, wind, and rainfall for each session.

parameters.name: session_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the session

parameters.name: meeting_key
parameters.description: Unique identifier for the meeting (Grand Prix weekend)

parameters.name: date>
parameters.description: Filter results where date is greater than the specified value (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: date<
parameters.description: Filter results where date is less than the specified value (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: rainfall
parameters.description: Filter by rainfall (1 = raining, 0 = dry)

parameters.name: track_temperature>=
parameters.description: Filter by minimum track temperature

parameters.name: air_temperature>=
parameters.description: Filter by minimum air temperature

brake.description: Whether the brake is pressed (100) or not (0)

driver_number.description: The unique number assigned to the driver

drs.description: DRS status. Possible values: 0-14 representing different DRS states. 10-14 = DRS enabled

meeting_key.description: The unique identifier for the meeting

rpm.description: Revolutions per minute of the engine

session_key.description: The unique identifier for the session

speed.description: Speed of the car in km/h

driver_number.description: The unique number assigned to the driver

headshot_url.description: URL of the driver's headshot image

meeting_key.description: The unique identifier for the meeting

session_key.description: The unique identifier for the session

team_colour.description: Hex color code of the team e.g. '3671C6'

driver_number.description: The unique number assigned to the driver

gap_to_leader.description: Gap to leader in seconds. Can be null for the leader.

interval.description: Interval to the car ahead in seconds. Can be null for the leader.

meeting_key.description: The unique identifier for the meeting

session_key.description: The unique identifier for the session

driver_number.description: The unique number assigned to the driver

i1_speed.description: Speed trap at intermediate 1 in km/h

i2_speed.description: Speed trap at intermediate 2 in km/h

is_pit_out_lap.description: Whether this is a pit out lap

meeting_key.description: The unique identifier for the meeting

session_key.description: The unique identifier for the session

driver_number.description: The unique number assigned to the driver

meeting_key.description: The unique identifier for the meeting

session_key.description: The unique identifier for the session

x.description: X position on the track map

y.description: Y position on the track map

z.description: Z position (height) on the track map

circuit_short_name.description: Short name of the circuit e.g. 'Bahrain'

date_start.description: Start date and time of the meeting

gmt_offset.description: GMT offset of the meeting location e.g. '03:00:00'

meeting_name.description: Official name of the meeting e.g. 'Bahrain Grand Prix'

date.description: UTC timestamp of the pit event

driver_number.description: The unique number assigned to the driver

lap_number.description: Lap number when the pit stop occurred

pit_duration.description: Duration of the pit stop in seconds

driver_number.description: The unique number assigned to the driver
Driver number if the message relates to a specific driver

lap_number.description: Lap number when the message was issued

date_end.description: End date and time of the session

date_start.description: Start date and time of the session

gmt_offset.description: GMT offset of the session location

driver_number.description: The unique number assigned to the driver

stint_number.description: Sequential stint number for the driver

tyre_age_at_start.description: Age of the tyre in laps at the start of the stint

date.description: UTC timestamp of the radio message

driver_number.description: The unique number assigned to the driver

recording_url.description: URL to the audio recording of the team radio message

rainfall.description: Whether there is rainfall (1) or not (0)

tags.name: Car Data
tags.description: Car telemetry data including speed, RPM, throttle, brake, DRS, gear

tags.name: Intervals
tags.description: Intervals between drivers and gap to leader

tags.name: Location
tags.description: Car location data on track (x, y, z coordinates)

tags.name: Stints
tags.description: Stint data including tyre compound and age
